---
title: "Is it worth the risk? Grievances and street protest participation during the COVID-19 pandemic in Chile"
description: "Estudio sobre agravios y participación en protestas callejeras durante la pandemia de COVID-19 en Chile."
venue: "Journal of Politics in Latin America, 14(3)"
tipo: articulo
date: "2022-01-01"
author: "Donoso, S., Puga, I., Moya, C., Gerber, M.M."
authors: [sofia-donoso, ismael-puga, cristobal-moya, monica-gerber]
reference: "Donoso, S., Puga, I., Moya, C., & Gerber, M.M. (2022). Is it worth the risk? Grievances and street protest participation during the COVID-19 pandemic in Chile. *Journal of Politics in Latin America*, 14(3), 338-362."
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
    body-classes: publicacion-page
---

# Is it worth the risk? Grievances and street protest participation during the COVID-19 pandemic in Chile

Estudio sobre agravios y participación en protestas callejeras durante la pandemia de COVID-19 en Chile.

**Autores OLES:** [Sofía Donoso](../equipo/sofia-donoso.html), [Ismael Puga](../equipo/ismael-puga.html), [Cristóbal Moya](../equipo/cristobal-moya.html), [Monica M. Gerber](../equipo/monica-gerber.html)

**Fecha:** 2022.

## Referencia sugerida

Donoso, S., Puga, I., Moya, C., & Gerber, M.M. (2022). Is it worth the risk? Grievances and street protest participation during the COVID-19 pandemic in Chile. *Journal of Politics in Latin America*, 14(3), 338-362.

[← Volver a Publicaciones](index.qmd)
